message:
fix(raptorq): stop counting duplicate and rejected symbols as received

RaptorQReceiver::receive_object previously incremented symbols_received
on every decoder.feed() call regardless of the return value. Duplicate
symbols (already seen ESI) and rejected symbols (failed validation) were
counted as successfully received, inflating the metric and making
diagnostic dashboards report more symbols consumed than actually
contributed to decoding.

Now the code matches on SymbolAcceptResult: only Accepted,
DecodingStarted, and BlockComplete bump the counter and metric.
Duplicate and Rejected results are silently skipped.

New test: test_receive_object_duplicate_symbols_do_not_inflate_used_count
verifies that feeding the same symbol twice results in symbols_received=1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
